1-expert.prompt_text: Search Condition resources with SNOMED 363349007 (Malignant neoplasm of stomach). Query: Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|363349007

1-naive.raw_response:
Here are FHIR queries to find patients with stomach cancer using common coding systems:

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|363349007&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.9&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10|C16.9&_include=Condition:patient
```

**Notes:**
- **SNOMED CT `363349007`** = *Malignant tumor of stomach*
- **ICD-10-CM `C16.9`** = *Malignant neoplasm of stomach, unspecified*
- `_include=Condition:patient` fetches the associated `Patient` resources in the same bundle
- For broader coverage of stomach cancer subtypes (e.g., cardia, fundus, antrum), you may want to expand the ICD-10-CM codes (C16.0–C16.9):

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.0&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.1&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.2&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.3&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.4&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.5&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.8&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.9&_include=Condition:patient
```

1-broad.raw_response:
```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|363349007&_include=Condition:subject
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.0,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.1,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.2,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.3,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.4,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.5,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.6,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.8,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C16.9&_include=Condition:subject
```

### Explanation

| Query | Code System | Code(s) | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| Query 1 | SNOMED CT | `363349007` | Malignant neoplasm of stomach (disorder) |
| Query 2 | ICD-10-CM | `C16.0–C16.9` | Full **C16** category — Malignant neoplasm of stomach, covering all sub-sites |

#### ICD-10-CM C16 Sub-codes Covered:
| Code | Description |
|---|---|
| C16.0 | Cardia |
| C16.1 | Fundus of stomach |
| C16.2 | Body of stomach |
| C16.3 | Pyloric antrum |
| C16.4 | Pylorus |
| C16.5 | Lesser curvature, unspecified |
| C16.6 | Greater curvature, unspecified |
| C16.8 | Overlapping sites |
| C16.9 | Stomach, **unspecified** (most common) |

- `_include=Condition:subject` retrieves the associated **Patient** resources in the same bundle.
- Both queries should be run to maximize coverage across coding systems used in different EHR systems.
1-broad.prompt_text: Find patients diagnosed with stomach (gastric) cancer — malignant neoplasm of the stomach.

1-expert.raw_response:
```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|363349007
```

### Explanation

| Component | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| **Resource Type** | `Condition` |
| **Search Parameter** | `code` |
| **Code System** | `http://snomed.info/sct` (SNOMED CT) |
| **Code** | `363349007` |
| **Concept** | Malignant neoplasm of stomach |

### Notes
- This query returns all `Condition` resources coded with SNOMED CT **363349007 – Malignant neoplasm of stomach**.
- To broaden results to include **child/descendant concepts** (e.g., specific stomach cancer subtypes), use the `:in` or `:below` modifier if your FHIR server supports it:
  ```
  Condition?code:below=http://snomed.info/sct|363349007
  ```
- To include related **patient demographics**, add `_include`:
  ```
  Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|363349007&_include=Condition:patient
  ```
- To filter by **active** conditions only:
  ```
  Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|363349007&clinical-status=active
  ```
